channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Grass verge at crossroads by golf club need cutting as causing visibility issues at busy junction, 26th May
item.description:
Cleeve hill junction with Wickfield lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wickfield Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ive not included photos since this is the same pothole around the sewage access point that is caused by the continual erosion around the sewage infrastructure and the excessive use of the road by industrial traffic. The hole is between highbury church and 44/46 Carlton street., 26th May
item.description:
Between highbury church and 44/46 Carlton street.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Carlton Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light obscured by overgrown tree, 25th May
item.description:
Street light in front of 20 laxton road is almost completely covered by the nearby tree. Light is not reaching the Street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Laxton Road, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dinner plate size pothole in eastbound carriageway, 25th May
item.description:
About 10 metres away from the pedestrian crossing on eastbound carriageway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 351, Innsworth Lane, Churchdown, Tewkesbury

item.title: Street light out, 25th May
item.description:
Street light number 23 is out
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Tewkesbury

item.title: Many clothes bags dumped by full clothes bins, 25th May
item.description:
Even though the new clothes bins have been moved AND large signs saying not to leave when bins are full, there has STILL been a large number of clothes bags and other paraphernalia dumped beside and in between the bins.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Bethesda Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Toilet and handbasin left in street, 25th May
item.description:
Toilet and hand basin dumped on corner of street on footpath, obstructing foot path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Bethesda Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 25th May
item.description:
More than 4 bags presented before collection day.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Hales Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Detritus and bird poo under bridge, 25th May
item.description:
Please could the cleaning team clean under the bridge up to the edges along both sides of the bridge. The cleaning machine whizzes by but misses this bit. Might need brushing by hand. Looks grotty. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Market Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Glass on Pavement Outside Greyhound Pub, 25th May
item.description:
Lot of broken glass on the pavement - probably at ///sundial.builders.systems - would have thought the pub might have dealt with it, but it's been there a few days...
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greyhound Gardens, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping overgrown grass weeds, 25th May
item.description:
The whole of Abbotswood alleys are an absolute overgrown mess It needs cutting & tidying

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Painswick Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in road outside 1 Snowdon Gardens, 25th May
item.description:
1 Snowdon Gardens

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Snowdon Gardens, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree roots damaging wall, 25th May
item.description:
A tree outside 283 Gloucester Road is damaging our garden wall. We have reported this several times. Someone from the tree department has been out to observe and recommended that the tree should be removed and replaced with one that is correctly planted with root protection. That was over 18 months ago but we have had no further update and no action since then, so would appreciate and update please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 326, Gloucester Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plants growing out of drain, 25th May
item.description:
Outside number 64
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayfield Drive, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree by side of Hyde Brook has fallen, 25th May
item.description:
Fallen tree across public footpath by Hyde Brook
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lowdilow Lane, Tewkesbury

item.title: Fly Tipping, 25th May
item.description:
Looks like illegal rubbish dumping just off the footpath / cycle path into Bishops Cleeve as you come in from Gotherington. It is opposite where some new houses are being built

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cleeve Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cleeve Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury

item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Electrical substation work commenced but not finished after over two months, temporary barriers left place, attached by cable ties, 25th May
item.description:
The pathway which runs adjacent to Pilley Naure Reserve, just down from Pilley Bridge.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Banbury and Cheltenham Direct Railway, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: SUGGESTION : Could more dotted lines be added on Arle Court roundabout, leading to A40 west ?, 25th May
item.description:
Similar to the two local reports here, the lane markings are confusing if one is travelling from Churchdown or Springbank / Hestors Way / Leonardo Hotel going TO the dual carriageway (A40 west). As a driving instructor, I also use it to LOOP from the A40 back to the A40. After one reaches the traffic lights adjacent to the Cheltenham exit, the right most lane essentially LOSES it's lane markings leading back around to the A40. Is it possible to add some DOTTED lines (not dash lines) to continue on around to the A40 west ?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: Rocky and uneven pathway following work by electrical company to the sub station, 25th May
item.description:
On the pathway just off Pilley Bridge, adjacent to Pilley Nature Reserve.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Banbury and Cheltenham Direct Railway, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
